Wrangler Linux auth not configured

No Cloudflare OAuth tokens cached on Linux machine (~/.config/wrangler/, ~/.wrangler/ both absent or empty). Headless wrangler whoami hangs indefinitely waiting for browser OAuth flow. Solution: use CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN env var — API token path, no browser required. Sean confirmed he has the token. Blocked on Sean providing token to configure in environment.

raw_excerpt:
Kaggle notebook does not auto-sync from GitHub

GitHub push updates the repo but Kaggle Code notebooks require manual cell edits or re-import. The dataset (JSONL files) syncs from GitHub automatically. The notebook code does NOT. Future notebook updates must be communicated to Sean as manual edits in Kaggle UI, or Sean must use Kaggle's Pull button to sync. Also: dataset mounts at /kaggle/input/datasets/rudi193/yggdrasil-training-data/ (not /kaggle/input/yggdrasil-training-data/).
